case_title: STEVEN SCHMITT VS. JARED W. COOK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCHMITT, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, JARED W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
